title: IHM Ahmedabad – Teaching Associate – 2 Posts
shortInfo: IHM Ahmedabad Teaching Associate Recruitment 2026 has been announced for 2 posts such as Teaching Associate – 2 vacancies for eligible Graduate candidates with NHTET qualification and required industry experience, with the application window offline open until 30-05-2026 on www.ihmahmadabad.com.

basic_details.job_title: IHM Ahmedabad Teaching Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: IHM Ahmedabad Teaching Associate Recruitment 2026 has been announced for 2 posts such as Teaching Associate – 2 vacancies for eligible Graduate candidates with NHTET qualification and required industry experience, with the application window offline open until 30-05-2026 on www.ihmahmadabad.com.

qualification.education_qualification: NHTET with NCHMCT percentage, Full time Bachelor's Degree in Hospitality & Hotel Administration from a recognized University (60% marks), Full time Master's degree in Hospitality & Hotel Administration (60% marks), At least 2 years industry experience

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IHM Ahmedabad Teaching Associate Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
